title: Historic markers
doc_html:
§708.  Historic markers

The Department of Culture, Recreation and Tourism shall erect markers at all sites of historic significance within the region in order to indicate the important events of the colonial period and during the existence of the Republic of West Florida.  

Acts 1990, No. 1021, §1.

§708.  Historic markers
The Department of Culture, Recreation and Tourism shall erect markers at all sites of historic significance within the region in order to indicate the important events of the colonial period and during the existence of the Republic of West Florida.
Acts 1990, No. 1021, §1.
